title: Employee performance
excerpt:
hi there, is there suitable dashboard for employee performance? i need to see Task completion rate by employee. 
thank you

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi there, is there suitable dashboard for employee performance? i need to see Task completion rate by employee.
thank you

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

There are many ways you can accomplish this and it depends on the structure of your account boards the tasks and people live in.

One of my favorites I like to structure is as follows:

  1. Deadline Mode - make sure every board has this enabled on the timeline and date column so that you have a overdue indicator.
  2. Completion Date - add a date column so that when the status that represents “Done” is selected, it registers the date automatically via automation.
  3. Connect Boards - connect the boards that you want to report on and ensure your Status, People and Date columns are somewhat consistent so that you can filter all boards.
  4. Bar Chart - use the bar chart with people in the X axis and the count of tasks on the y axis. Filter this one to date column is over due and that is the first SLA.
  5. Stacked Bar Chart - use the dare column on the x in weeks and count on the y axis but stack by people this filter down to the ones completed and you get a summary per week comparing productivity across the team
  6. Pie Chart - you can use the people label and then the count to filter to overdue to also compare percentage of performance week over week.
  7. Line Graph - show the teams productivity by placing the completion dates in a month format on the x axis and count on the y axis. Filter the widget to done status and you have the trend of team performance.

There is a lot more to think of but this will be helpful and when you have 1:1 meetings, you can filter to that person to review how their doing!

Hope that helps!
